case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC VS. ANSON FREITAS

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FREITAS, ANSON
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FREITAS, ANSON SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-13-2014
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC SERVED MAR-01-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FREITAS, ANSON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FREITAS, ANSON $2,589.87 PRINCIPAL, $329.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,918.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
